title: helichrysum citrispinum var. aberdaricum
intro: Helichrysum citrispinum var. aberdaricum, also known as Aberdare Mountain Helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Helichrysum citrispinum var. aberdaricum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
